title: BEEWAY Locking Carabiner, Premium Aluminum Alloy D-Ring Carabiners Key Chain Clip Hook for Camping, Hiking, Traveling, Fishing, Backpack
features: LIGHT WEIGHT AND DURABLE - Made from superior durable lightweight aircraft aluminum alloy material.
EASY TO USE - The carabiner features a spring loaded gate which allows them to be quickly and securely attached to a wide range of fixing points.

APPLICATIONS - Used for daily life, attached to the backpack or handbag for hanging keys, flashlight, cords, ropes, hoses, water bottle and other items. Also can be used as as a keyring. Very durable and great for hiking, camping, cycling, fishing, traveling and other outdoor sports. (NOTE: NOT FOR CLIMING).
INCLUDES - 8x aluminum alloy locking carabiners, 2x Keychain rings.
description: BEEWAY LOCKING CARABINER is designed for outdoor and indoor use! Compact, Lightweight and Ultra Durable, high grade aluminum material. Stylish and classic design make you eye-catching in your daily life use. Well made locking mechanism and sturdy D-shaped body make it more heavy duty. An useful small gadget - Attaching to rucksacks or backpacks; - Use for attaching water bottle, camping gear and other things to your backpack when camping; - Can be used a keychain to keep your keys or small items without the risk of any falling off; - Use these as a hook for your escape artist dog or cat's leash, there will not be any breakout incidents ; - Use them to attach accessories for your day-pack and camera bag; - Use these to hang things - flashlights, extension cords, ropes, light weight chains, tools that anything that can be attached. Specification Material: Aluminum Alloy Weight: 23.5g / pcs Size: Approx. 77mm (L) x 42mm (W) 8mm (D) WARNING: It is NOT recommended to be used in mountaineering, rock climbing, ice climbing and high-altitude games for your safety.
